name: @onfabric/waclaw-plugin
description: Send and receive messages from WhatsApp Business API
author: Fabric Developers <developers@onfabric.io>

channel.label: WhatsApp (waclaw)
channel.blurb: Connect OpenClaw to WhatsApp via the waclaw proxy.

scripts.build: bun build index.ts setup-entry.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external openclaw
